task.title: Install Python Package for Project
task.description: Install the 'requests' package for the web scraping module. The project uses a virtual environment in ./venv/.
constraints: Only modify files within the project directory
Do not modify system Python installation

steps.thought: Let me verify the virtual environment exists.
steps.observation:
drwxr-xr-x  6 user user 4096 Dec  6 10:30 .
drwxr-xr-x 12 user user 4096 Dec  6 10:25 ..
drwxr-xr-x  2 user user 4096 Dec  6 10:30 bin
drwxr-xr-x  2 user user 4096 Dec  6 10:30 lib
-rw-r--r--  1 user user   75 Dec  6 10:30 pyvenv.cfg

steps.thought: Virtual environment exists. Let me activate it.
Virtual environment activated. Now I'll install requests within the venv.
steps.observation:
Collecting requests
  Downloading requests-2.31.0-py3-none-any.whl (62 kB)
Collecting charset-normalizer<4,>=2
  Downloading charset_normalizer-3.3.2-cp311-cp311-manylinux_2_17_x86_64.whl (142 kB)

  Downloading idna-3.6-py3-none-any.whl (61 kB)

steps.thought: Package installed. Let me verify it's in the venv and working.
Confirmed installed in project venv. Let me test functionality.

arguments.command: source venv/bin/activate && python -c 'import requests; r = requests.get("https://httpbin.org/status/200"); print(r.status_code)'

steps.thought: Package installed correctly in virtual environment and working properly.

arguments.message: Successfully installed requests package version 2.31.0 in project virtual environment. Package location: venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/. Verified functionality with test request.
